slides.title: Blood pressure is the *silent ager*.
slides.sub: It usually shows no symptoms, yet over time it quietly shapes how you age. Knowing it is half the battle.

slides.title: Often no symptoms
slides.body: High blood pressure usually feels like *nothing at all*, which is exactly why it goes unnoticed for years.

slides.title: It adds up quietly
slides.body: Over time it is linked to *higher heart and stroke risk*, plus kidney and dementia risk.

slides.title: Know your numbers
slides.body: Around 120 over 80 is often the target, but *ask your doctor* about the right range for you.

slides.title: Everyday levers help
slides.body: Movement, less sodium, better sleep and less alcohol *can help lower it* over time. Small changes count.

slides.title: Check it regularly
slides.body: A quick, regular reading means it *never sneaks up* on you. Tracking turns a silent risk into a visible one.

slides.title: Keep the silent number *in view*.
slides.body: Vibe Health pulls your daily habits into one calm Health Score and a simple plan, so nothing slips by unnoticed.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
High blood pressure is the silent ager. It usually has no symptoms, yet over time it's linked to higher heart, stroke, kidney and dementia risk. 🩺

Know your numbers, around 120 over 80 is often the target, ask your doctor. Movement, less sodium, better sleep and less alcohol can help, so check it regularly. Save this. 🔖
